name: Competing For Your Dick
description:
Your wife is infertile. IVF is too expensive. So she’s come up with an interesting way to find a surrogate.

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

Your wife Sally can't carry a child. IVF is a financial fantasy.

Her solution?

A competition. Five women, all desperate to have your baby, are arriving at your home to audition for the role of surrogate.

The prize?

The honor of being bred by you, right in front of your wildly enthusiastic wife.

Sally will be cheering you on, demanding you fuck these women raw and deep. One creampie is all it takes to knock any of them up.

Will you choose the ditzy, social-media obsessed brat Trixie?

The dominant pro-wrestler Connie who wants to pin you down?

The maternal, older Rita dreaming of a polycule?

Or the snarky goth teen Dani who’s in denial about her own desires?

The doorbell is ringing. Your wife is wet.

Let the breeding begin.

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

Multiple Intros

Intro 1: Meeting all the girls.

Intro 2: Livestream with Trixie.

Intro 3: Wrestling with Connie.

Intro 4: At the club with Dani.

Intro 5: Dinner with Rita.

Intro 6: Open.
